description: Two independent lookups requested at once with a single-location tool. A strong agent emits two tool_use blocks in one turn; we hard-require at least one valid call and treat the second as bonus (some models serialise across turns). Exercises the proxy's multi-tool_use-in-one-message path.

request.system: You are a helpful assistant with access to tools. When multiple independent lookups are needed, you may call the tool more than once in a single turn.

messages.content: Compare the current weather in Paris and in Tokyo.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a single location.
